title: FSMM - Fex's Small Money Mod
description: Mod providing money items (which can be deposited/withdrawn) and an Account/Bank system. You can define any item as money in config!
body:
### This is a "small" mod that adds item currency.    
Money items can be used to physically trade with players,    
as well as deposit/withdraw them via the ATM.    
You can transfer money to other players via the ATM.    

### High configurability.
In config you can make FSMM generate more of it's own items (but you have to supply textures via a resourcepack), remove some, or all of them.    
You can also define items from **other** mods as valid FSMM currency which will work with the ATM!

### And if other compatible mods are present...
You can switch active account in the ATM and manage different accounts, like for example your Town's Account if you're Mayor ([see Land Developer](https://modrinth.com/mod/land-developer))


### Known compatible Mods:
- [FSMM Shop Block](https://modrinth.com/mod/fsmm-shop-block)
- pCMDs (Payable Command Signs)
- [Land Developer](https://modrinth.com/mod/land-developer) (Terrain Protection)
- Oxygen API (make sure to use the NEW currency provider, not the official one which isn't maintained)
- [Modded Spigot/Bukkit Server Bridge Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fsmm-spigot-bridge)
